---
title: "Failure Modes"
---

# Failure Modes

Common spell failures:

- Vague target.
- Hidden constraints.
- Missing artifact boundary.
- No output contract.
- No truth test.
- No fallback behavior.
- False certainty.
- Overbroad autonomy.

Common stack failures:

- Monolithic relapse.
- Invisible handoffs.
- Gate skipping.
- Spin loops.
- Infinite descent.
- Process bloat.
- Seal drift.
